CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local triggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity
if triggerBodyEntity == nil then return end
local myPlayer = _UserService.LocalPlayer
if triggerBodyEntity ~= myPlayer then return end
if self.Target ~= nil then log("사다리가 나타납니다") self.Target.Enable = true end
